title: Setting up monday account with hubspot and xero
excerpt:
I am looking for some help from a professional monday person to help my team and i set up our monday account. 
We are an Australian based construction company who want to use monday to help manage our projects and CRM. W…

posts.author: BrianF (Brian F)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for some help from a professional monday person to help my team and i set up our monday account.
We are an Australian based construction company who want to use monday to help manage our projects and CRM. We currently hubspot crm and are looking to migrate across- and we will still be using hubspot for our marketing, service and CMS. We also use xero for our invoices, timesheets and payments.
We would like these to work together as nicely as possible.
Is there anyone who is experienced in working with these platforms who would be able to help us?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BrianF

Welcome to the community!

We can help you here at upstream - we’re an award winning team with accreditations in both monday.com and HubSpot!

We’re Platinum Partners of monday.com, with our team most recently bagging another Professional Services Partner of the Year award, as well as being Platinum Partners of HubSpot - with highly experienced teams supporting both partnerships.

We also have an in-house full stack custom dev team, who have developed the Xero to monday.com integration built and ready to install straight from the monday.com app Marketplace.

Please feel free to contact me directly via below details, or even better, book straight into my calendar using this link.

I look forward to providing demonstration and chatting together soon!

Kind regards,
Peta Bolger
Services Consultant at upstream

posts.author: CarbonJon (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @BrianF and welcome to the monday.com community forums! There are a ton of great partners out there and allow me to introduce the team from CarbonWeb!

As a Channel and Advanced Delivery Partner with monday.com, we work with users every day to solve their biggest problems on the platform. Whether it’s learning all the basics or developing advanced third-party integrations, our team is here to help!

I’d appreciate the chance to connect with you and explore this workflow further. If you would like to grab some time with me please do so here: Calendly

Good luck as you develop your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Jonathan Grad

Account Manager
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : jgrad@carbonweb.co

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It’s great to hear that you’re interested in using monday.com to manage your projects and CRM for your construction company. Migrating from HubSpot CRM to Monday.com while keeping your HubSpot marketing, service, and CMS, as well as integrating with Xero, can indeed be a powerful setup.

I recommend considering the following steps to ensure a smooth transition:

  1. Consult with a monday. com Expert
  2. Ensure Smooth Data Migration
  3. Integration with Xero
  4. Training
  5. Testing
  6. Ongoing Support

You might want to reach out to monday.com’s customer support or connect with monday.com consulting company who are specialized in the kind of integration and setup you’re looking for.

Best of luck with your transition to monday. com, and I hope it proves to be a valuable tool for your construction company!

Regards,
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
